# Pilot Tracker — Five LTM Colleagues

**Story:** [9.3-001](../stories/epic-09-security-quality-gates.md#story-93-001-five-colleague-live-pilot) *(moved from epic-06 story 6.3-001 on 2026-06-11)*
**Owner:** FX. Colleagues do not edit this file — it's the running ledger.
**See also:** [`README.md`](README.md), [`docs/onboarding.md`](../onboarding.md), [`feedback-template.md`](feedback-template.md), [`decision-record.md`](decision-record.md)

This file tracks each invited colleague through the pilot. One row per
colleague, one column per gate. Update it as pilot artifacts come in.

---

## Roster + status

| # | Colleague (initials) | Platform | Install path | Invite sent | Onboarding read | Install date | `/build-stories` date | Feedback returned | Verdict (1–5) | Issues filed (pilot-feedback) | Notes |
|---|----------------------|----------|--------------|-------------|-----------------|--------------|-----------------------|-------------------|---------------|-------------------------------|-------|
| 1 |                      |          |              |             |                 |              |                       |                   |               |                               |       |
| 2 |                      |          |              |             |                 |              |                       |                   |               |                               |       |
| 3 |                      |          |              |             |                 |              |                       |                   |               |                               |       |
| 4 |                      |          |              |             |                 |              |                       |                   |               |                               |       |
| 5 |                      |          |              |             |                 |              |                       |                   |               |                               |       |

**Column conventions:**

- _Platform_: `macOS-AS` (Apple Silicon), `macOS-Intel`, `WSL2`, `Linux`.
- _Install path_: `A` (`/plugin marketplace add`) or `B` (`./install.sh`).
- _Dates_: ISO `YYYY-MM-DD`. Leave blank until the gate is reached.
- _Verdict_: integer 1–5 from the feedback form's "Would you recommend it?"
  section. Blank if no feedback returned.
- _Issues filed_: count of issues with the `pilot-feedback` label this
  colleague opened. Hyperlink to the filtered query if useful.

---

## Coverage target (story 9.3-001 acceptance)

The epic's acceptance criteria require, at minimum:

- [ ] **5 colleagues identified.**
- [ ] **At least one Windows / WSL2 pilot.**
- [ ] **At least one Intel Mac pilot** (if a willing colleague is available).
- [ ] **5 feedback forms returned.**
- [ ] **≥ 4 of 5 verdicts are 4 or 5** ("yes" / "yes-after-fixes").
- [ ] **Every friction point filed as a GitHub issue with the `pilot-feedback` label.**

---

## Status legend

- _Blank cell_ — gate not yet reached.
- ✓ — gate passed.
- ✗ — gate failed (explain in Notes column).
- — — gate skipped (e.g. colleague dropped out; explain in Notes).

---

## Live issue queue

Issues colleagues file should land at:
<https://github.com/fxmartin/claude-code-config/issues?q=label%3Apilot-feedback>

Group them by colleague in the table above (count or list). Triage decisions
(must-fix vs defer) feed into [`decision-record.md`](decision-record.md).
